src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login module: authentication source files or pages: 2 covered methods: preconditions: user has registered and received a valid email and password. test data: - email: user@example.com - password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter email and password into the ui. 2. click the login button. 3. ui validates the input. 4. ui sends credentials to firebaseauthentication. 5. firebaseauthentication validates the credentials. 6. firebaseauthentication retrieves user data from firebasestore. 7. firebaseauthentication returns a token to firebasestore. 8. firebasestore confirms the save operation. 9. firebaseauthentication returns the token to the ui. 10. ui displays "login riuscito" and "accesso effettuato con successo". expected result: user is logged in successfully. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-login-002 title: invalid credentials module: authentication source files or pages: 2 covered methods: preconditions: user has registered but entered incorrect credentials. test data: - email: wrongemail@example.com - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. enter incorrect email and password into the ui. 2. click the login button. 3. ui validates the input. 4. ui sends credentials to firebaseauthentication. 5. firebaseauthentication validates the credentials and finds them invalid. 6. firebaseauthentication returns an error message to the ui. 7. ui displays "login fallito" and "mostra messaggio di errore". expected result: user is informed of the login failure. unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-registration-001 title: successful registration module: registration source files or pages: 3 covered methods: preconditions: user has provided valid registration data. test data: - name: john doe - email: johndoe@example.com - password: strongpassword test steps: 1. provide valid registration data in the ui. 2. click the registration button. 3. ui validates the input. 4. ui sends registration request to firebaseauthentication. 5. firebaseauthentication validates the data. 6. firebaseauthentication saves the user data to firebasestore. 7. firebasestore confirms the save operation. 8. firebaseauthentication returns a confirmation message to the ui. 9. ui displays "conferma registrazione avvenuta". expected result: user is registered successfully. unit: project:
best_ref_embedding_text: source: code test case id: tc-registeractivity-001 title: test signup method with valid credentials module: registeractivity source files or pages: ["app/src/main/java/com/seaguard/ui/auth/registeractivity.java"] covered methods: ["signup"] preconditions: ["the user has entered valid credentials in the name, email, password, and confirm password fields"] test data: ["valid email address", "valid password", "valid confirm password", "valid name"] test steps: ["click the sign up button", "verify that the progress bar is displayed", "verify that the user is signed in", "verify that the user's profile is updated with the name"] expected result: ["the user is redirected to the home screen", "the progress bar is hidden", "the user is signed in", "the user's profile is updated with the name"] unit: ui_14 project: code_file6

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-registration-002 title: invalid registration data module: registration source files or pages: 3 covered methods: preconditions: user has provided invalid registration data. test data: - name: john doe - email: invalidemail - password: weakpassword test steps: 1. provide invalid registration data in the ui. 2. click the registration button. 3. ui validates the input and finds it invalid. 4. ui informs the user about the invalid data. 5. user corrects and resubmits the data. 6. ui validates the corrected input. 7. ui sends the corrected registration request to firebaseauthentication. 8. firebaseauthentication validates the data and finds it invalid. 9. firebaseauthentication returns an error message to the ui. 10. ui displays "login fallito" and "mostra messaggio di errore". expected result: user is informed of the registration failure. unit: project:
